subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Gul-i-Mawla
subcodes.first_line: Flower of God! How many are the dervishes who journeyed through the wildernesses of longing in remembrance of their Lord and swam in the oceans of yearning
subcodes.first_line_orig: گل مولی چه بسیار از دراویش که در صحراهای شوق بیاد مولی سیاح شدند و در بحور
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @rejection by the people of the Bayan
